## Summary\n\nIncreases body/secondary text sizes across all 7 Storygate Studio pages so fonts remain consistent top-to-bottom instead of shrinking progressively as users scroll.\n\n## Scope\n\n- `text-sm` body text → `text-base` (16px) across all pages\n- List items → `text-base` or `text-lg` (18px) for better readability\n- Footer and trust-line text → `text-base`\n- Back-navigation links → `text-base`\n- Does NOT touch headings, section labels, or button text (those are intentionally styled smaller for design hierarchy)\n\n## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)\n\nBranch-Behind-Base: 0\n\n## Risks & Anomalies\n\nNone — purely cosmetic font-size increases on static pages.\n\n---\n\nNo-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — no evaluation, API, or logic changes."
